类 PageHelperProperties

java.lang.Object
java.util.Dictionary<Object,Object>

java.util.Properties
io.github.lishangbu.avalon.mybatis.pagehelper.properties.PageHelperProperties
所有已实现的接口:
Serializable, Cloneable, Map<Object,Object>
@ConfigurationProperties(prefix="pagehelper") public class PageHelperProperties extends Properties
Configuration properties for PageHelper.
作者:
liuzh
